svg.title: Dating App Full Architecture
svg.desc: Complete system architecture showing Flutter frontend modules and Node.js backend modules

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Auth module in detail for the dating app')
g.text: Register / Login / OTP verify / Role select

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Profile module for the dating app')
sendPrompt('Explain the Girls Browse and Swipe module for the dating app')
g.text: View all boys / Right or left swipe

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Boys Queue module for the dating app')
g.text: See only girls who liked them first

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Match module for the dating app')
g.text: Boy accepts or rejects girl's like

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Chat module for the dating app')
sendPrompt('Explain the Notification module for the dating app')
g.text: Push alerts for likes, matches, messages

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Boost and Profile Visibility module')
g.text: Boost Module — auto / paid boost logic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Auth Service for Node.js backend')
sendPrompt('Explain the User Service in Node.js backend')
sendPrompt('Explain the Swipe Service in detail')
g.text: Handle girl swipe / unlock boy queue

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Match Service for the dating app backend')
sendPrompt('Explain the Chat Service WebSocket setup')
sendPrompt('Explain the Boost Service and auto-boost algorithm')
g.text: Auto boost after N days / paid boost
